jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws, and caddy active; /api/status healthy; major HTML/API probes returned 307/401/200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: Fresh audit checkpoint due after 6 successful remediation runs
lastRun.summary: Performed the required fresh audit checkpoint instead of starting a new remediation batch because successfulRemediationRunsSinceFreshAudit reached 6. No code changes were required: backlog was already current, git/remote were clean, no overlapping remediation/build/test process was found, production services were active and healthy, quality gates passed, major route probes returned expected auth redirects/401/200, smoke passed 19/19, and recent service logs were clean.
validation: checked git status and recent commits; local HEAD matched origin/main at 42bbf08 before checkpoint
checked process list; no overlapping remediation/build/test process found
production services vcontrolhub-next.service, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, and caddy.service active before checks
recent vcontrolhub service logs contained no error/warn matches
static scans: no internal app <a href="/ navigation, no confirm/prompt/window.location.reload under src/app
npm run lint passed with existing client-effect warnings only
major production probes returned expected / HTML 307, guarded API 401, /api/status 200 without 500
post-smoke recent vcontrolhub service logs contained no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: No runtime code changed, so no production restart was required; current production services were active and smoke/probes/log checks passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue backlog-driven remediation from the refreshed backlog; look for the next high-value item via audit findings such as bounded growing-list surfaces, API auth-route drift, long-running storage/SFTP background task UX, or newly discovered product gaps.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
